titleStmt.title: SII 31.67: original edition by C. A. Padmanabha Sastri and T. S. Ravishankar
No. 67. (A.R. No. B 248 of 1938.) KOTTEPALLE (Hamlet of Poḍadurti), KAMALAPURAM TALUK, CUDDAPAH DISTRICT.

summary.p: Pillar lying in survey No. 250 about two furlongs to the west of the village.
This record is dated Śaka 1445, Svabhānu, Āsvīja śu. 12, Monday corresponding to September 21, 1523 A.D.

Registers the gift of land of 4 kha at Poḍadurtti to Basavānajul (Basava-yājulu), son of Paruvatabhaṭlu of Vaśishṭa gōtra, Yajuśākha and Aśvalāyana sūtra by Nāgapanāyaka, son of Kamdanavōlī Hāṁnapanāyaka, when Śrī Kṛishṇadēvarāya was ruling the country. It is stated that the donor received Guddalūru as nāyamkara from the king. The boundaries of the gift are as follows Kuṁṭa on the eastern side, Kālva on the southern side and a land on the south-eastern side.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . śrī jayādbhu(bhyu)
daya śālivāhana śaka
kavaruṣaṁbulu 1445 [Agu*]
nēṁṭī svabhānu saṁtsara saṁvatsara Āśvīja
śu 12 sō . śrīmaṁma
hārājādhirāja pa
ramēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa
śrīvīrakṛṣṇarāya mahārā
yalu pṛdhvīsāṁbrājyaṁ śē
yaṁgānu śrīmatu kaṁdanavō
li haṁsapanāyani kumāru
ḍu nāgapanāyaṁḍu Āśve(śva)lāyana
sūtra vasiṣṭagōtra yajuśākhā
dhyāyulaina paruvatabhaṭla koḍku ba
savāvajalku yicina bhūdāna
valaya śāsna(sana) kramameṭlannānu . śrīkri
ṣṇarāyamahārāyalu mākunāya
ṁkkarānku pāliṁcina guddalūrki cellē poda
turitī grāmāna kriṣṇarāyala gārki
puṁṇyaṁgānu dhāra Ōsina kṣētraṁ
cēnu kha maḍi 4 Akṣarālanu cē
nu paṁdu maḍi pu
trapautrapāraṁpariyaṁgānu [A*]nubha
viṁcēdi . yiṁdku yavvaru tapinā
nu kāsi(śi)lōsu gōpubrāṁhmani
vadhiṁcina pāpānaṁ bōvuvāru .

ṁcēnu yeguvakuṁṭa venaka
nu vuttarānku koṁḍadakṣanā
naku kālva yīśānānku tū
rupu cēnu yīkṣētrānaku ta
pina vāru mātṛ
ṁ pitru drōhamunu
sēsina pāpānapō
vu vāru . śrī śrī śrī .
Digital edition of SII 31.67 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
